Heritage World Coin Auctions - Showcase Auction 61596, Lot 21048 — Ancients
MACEDONIAN KINGDOM. Alexander III the Great (336-323 BC). AR drachm (18mm, 4.23 gm, 11h). NGC MS 4/5 - 5/5. Posthumous issue, Teos, ca. 310-301 BC. Head of Heracles right, wearing lion skin h
sales.description:
Ancients
MACEDONIAN KINGDOM. Alexander III the Great (336-323 BC). AR drachm (18mm, 4.23 gm, 11h). NGC MS 4/5 - 5/5. Posthumous issue, Teos, ca. 310-301 BC. Head of Heracles right, wearing lion skin headdress, paws tied before neck / AΛEΞANΔPOY, Zeus seated left on backless throne, right leg drawn back, feet on stool, eagle in outstretched right hand, grounded scepter in left; HΔ monogram in left field, ΠO monogram below strut. Price 2292.

Alexander the Great, born in 356 BC in Pella, Macedon...

MACEDONIAN KINGDOM. Alexander III the Great (336-323 BC). AR drachm (18mm, 4.28 gm, 11h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Posthumous issue, Colophon, 319-310 BC. Head of Heracles right, wearing lion skin headdress, paws tied before neck / AΛEΞANΔPOY, Zeus seated left on backless throne, right leg drawn back, feet on stool, eagle in outstretched right hand, grounded scepter in left; ΛEI (ΛE ligate) in left field, ΛA below strut. Price 1779 var. (AΛ). Splendid aura of cerulean and marigold.
